Video.summary: Chris and Eric are building the ultimate kayak vehicle, a Nissan Frontier Pro 4X, in one month.
Video.title: Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1

Image.alt: Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1
Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1
Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1

Video.summary: Under a tight deadline for SEMA, Chris and Eric are scrambling to finish their Nissan Frontier.
Video.title: Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2

Image.alt: Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2
Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2

Video.summary: Brad Starks' '32 Ford Coupe: a classic hot rod rebellion packing a supercharged LT4 with 680hp!
Video.title: Brad Starks - 1932 Coupe

Video.summary: We’re at Stovalls collision and wrecking service searching for a 4 wheel drive square body.
Video.title: How To Choose A Square Body

Image.alt: How To Choose A Square Body
How To Choose A Square Body
How To Choose A Square Body

Video.summary: We picked up a 1985 Chevy K-10 with a plan to do a full rebuild.
Video.title: Hip to be Square Body

Video.summary: We lay out our plan to rebuild our 1985 Chevy K-10.
Video.title: The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere

Image.alt: The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere
The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere
The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere

Video.summary: The transformation continues on this clean '85 K-10 square body.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown

Video.summary: Our 1985 Chevy K-10 square body gets stripped, sanded and primed. Then we add a two-tone paint job.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint

Video.summary: The frame work for our 1985 Chevy K-10 is being blasted and painted.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh

Video.summary: We start reassembling our 1985 Chevy K-10 square body. We add steering, brakes, exhaust, and glass.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly

Video.summary: Our K-10 Square body is coming back to life with restoration parts, cooling, and electrical.
Video.title: Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive

Image.alt: Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive
Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive
Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive

Video.summary: We wrap up our Chevy K-10 square body build with the final assembly of trim work, bumpers, and more

Video.summary: How to get factory-match paint for your ’69 Dodge Dart. Color mixing tips for Project Bullseye.
Video.title: Project Bullseye – Match Game

Video.summary: Installing front and back suspension on a 1969 Dodge Dart, with tips for control, safety, and style.
Video.title: Project Bullseye – Suspension Installation

Video.summary: We're making real progress on Project Bullseye, our '69 Dodge Dart, with suspension, wiring, and paint.
Video.title: Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash

Image.alt: Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash
Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash
Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash

Video.summary: With its rear axle installed, new tires mounted, and trim blacked out, our 1969 Dart is now on all fours.
Video.title: Finally Looks Like a Dart Again

Image.alt: Finally Looks Like a Dart Again
Finally Looks Like a Dart Again
Finally Looks Like a Dart Again

Video.summary: Project Bullseye gets a power upgrade, brakes, steering, painted scooped hood, and Swinger stripe.
Video.title: Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop

Image.alt: Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop
Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop
Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop

Video.summary: Dirt & Trails kicks off with a 1987 Land Cruiser and a 1994 F-150, affectionately named Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Welcome to Dirt and Trails

Video.summary: Project Leadfoot gets a new roll cage, then upgrades to the lift, suspension, steering and brakes.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Video.summary: Chris and Eric install a 600hp Ford 460 Big Block and Tremec TR4050 into Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Video.summary: Eric and Chris overhaul Project Leadfoot's gauges, build transfer case bracing, and wire it up.
Video.title: Gauges, Wiring, and Welding Galore!

Video.summary: Eric measures Leadfoot's driveshafts; Chris preps the 600hp F-150 with new intake, exhaust, and fuel.
Video.title: Exhausting Exhaust Systems

Video.summary: Our '94 Ford F-150 Leadfoot goes from pickup to beast with crazy mods, a trail shakedown, and a Bigfoot cameo.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot is Complete

Video.summary: The guys install some drivetrain upgrades on their CTS-V, and paint some custom stripes on the 72 Chevelle.
Video.title: Caddy Drivetrain and Chevelle Stripes

Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Video.summary: The guys drag a classic Chevy out of a hay barn.
Video.title: Barn Find Bow Tie

Video.summary: 'The guys install a plethora of new body panels on their barn-find Chevelle.
Video.title: Sheetmetal Makeover

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew Upgrades the suspension on a classic Chevelle for corner carving and high end handling
Video.title: Chevelle - New Legs

Video.summary: How to fit panels on a classic Chevelle, as well as repairing cracked or broken fiberglass
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits

Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits
Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits

Video.summary: A frame-off Chevelle Barn find restoration continues with a dazzling metallic baby blue paint job.
Video.title: 72 Chevelle: Baby Blue

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy plug a monster bowtie powerplant into the newly painted Chevelle Project.
Video.title: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Image.alt: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys install a brand new interior in their ’72 Chevelle project.
Video.title: Chevelle Inside Out

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy work on getting the 1972 Chevelle Supercharger Innercooler plumbed.
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber

Image.alt: Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber
Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber
Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber

Video.summary: The 1972 Chevelle barn find project needs a fuel system to support the 1000 horsepower engine.

Image.alt: Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust
Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy finish up the barn find Chevelle build and take it to a famous road in the Smoky Mountains.
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle Payoff

Video.summary: What started as a simple “aerosol overhaul” gets more complicated!
Video.title: AMC-Powered Postal Jeep

Video.summary: A '78 Postal Jeep gets a second chance.
Video.title: Special Delivery

Video.summary: Our '78 Postal Jeep gets an upgraded suspension that can handle the trails.
Video.title: Junk Mail Suspension

Video.summary: We start the reassembly of our '78 Postal Jeep.
Video.title: Mail Jeep Resurrection

Video.summary: The guys make room on Junk Mail for bigger wheels and tires.
Video.title: Junk Mail Body Mods

Video.summary: We start the final push getting Junk Mail one step closer to the trail.
Video.title: Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing

Image.alt: Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing
Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing

Video.summary: Our '78 Postal Jeep gets the interior buttoned up adding shifters and seats.

Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff

Video.summary: We bring Project Junk Mail back into the shop to address some trail problems.

EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails

Video.summary: We enhance Project Crazy Horse with new suspensions, wheels, and an upgraded axle.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Frame & Chassis

Video.summary: We install a new front axle and suspension on Project Crazy Horse, rejuvenating an old Ford Bronco.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Engine

Video.summary: We build a trans tunnel and wheel tubs in our 72 Super Cheyenne for a lowered stance.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 5: Tunnel Vision

Video.summary: This old Bronco is start of Project Crazy Horse and Stacey has got a mess on his hands.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Rust Replacement

Video.summary: The Carcass crew found a 2012 Jeep JK at an auction and just had to buy it.
Video.title: Jeep JK Part 1: Suspension Overhaul

Video.summary: The guys put the final touches on the Jeep JK, adding a new bumper and winch.
Video.title: Jeep JK Part 2: Trail Accessories

Video.summary: The Carcass crew invites a few friends out for a day on the trails.
Video.title: Off-Road Excursion
